subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of the All-Merciful Lord! Thy mother of auspicious destiny hath been favoured with divine bounties and hath succeeded in rendering service [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خداوند مهربان مادر نیک اختر را بدرقه عنایت رسید و موفق بخدمت گردید و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition
